summary: The diff demonstrates comprehensive implementation of both requirements. The Services.tsx component has been redesigned with card-based layouts, circular badge icons, serif typography, rounded borders, category headers, and proper spacing matching the reference format. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: Multiple service categories beyond 'Mini Readings' and 'Premium/In-Depth Readings' including 'Love & Relationship', 'Career/Money/Life', and 'Deep & Detailed'
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 states 'Add similar sections for Premium / In-Depth Readings and other service categories if applicable' which could justify additional categories, but the BuildRequest specifically mentions only 'Mini Readings' and 'Premium / In-Depth Readings' as examples. The implementation added three additional categories not explicitly requested.
